notes: Spark JDBC end-to-end via wallet (mTLS). Driver wrote wallet to /tmp/wallet/alh, then broadcast wallet bytes to all executors via spark.sparkContext.broadcast + mapPartitions setup. JDBC query against ADW 26ai returned COUNT=6 user tables. Demonstrates the ESSENTIAL pattern for production Spark JDBC with Oracle wallets in AIDP — executors do NOT share /tmp with driver; wallet must be distributed via broadcast.
